emails.body: Re: Please Take a Look--Draft Slides for Monday Talk in New York on California Crisis Yes. Thanks very much Maureen and Ginger. There is a subsequent power point presentation that I'm fairly confident I distributed (may have done so after I got back from New York, so you might also want to search Steve and Rick's in-boxes through the first two weeks of February). Thanks again for the help. Best, Jeff Richard Shapiro 07/09/2001 01:46 PM
